channel.title: There is no documentation for AdSense integration and i don't find any package also
channel.description:
Frontity doent have any package for Adsense and there is no document for it.
Google Ads Manager is useless - not all use it and there will be only 1% who will use it and rest 99% needs Adsense.

item.description:
Frontity doent have any package for Adsense and there is no document for it.
